title: Ghost Pirate Ship Building Blocks Toy Set with Lights, Creative Ship Building Toy for Home Office Collection Decor, Gifts for Adults Men Women（1100 Pcs）
features: 💡【Green Lighting Effects】Our pirate ship model has a unique green lighting effect, just connect the power supply to turn on the lights, the whole model will emit a green glow, creating a mysterious atmosphere of a nighttime ocean journey.

️【Mysterious Ghost Pirate Ship】This pirate ship building model is very realistic with cannons, 3 masts and watchtowers on both sides of the ship. Every detail has been carefully designed and it is not easy to deform and fade. You can build this ghost ship that never docks on your own to create a truly amazing visual spectacle.

⛵【Pirate Ship Model Collectibles】The Pirate Ship Building Block Set is a perfect decorative and collectible item that you can place in your home or office to show off your unique taste. This unique piece will stand out and add a touch of mystery to your surroundings.

🧩【Fun Block Building Toys】The Pirate Ship Building Blocks Playset consists of 1100 high quality small blocks, perfect for teens aged 14+ and adults to put together. It is an educational toy to improve your logical thinking and creativity, spending some time assembling this ghost ship model will be beneficial for relaxation.

🎁【Best Gift】Whether it's a birthday, Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving, graduation gift or any other holiday, our pirate ship model block set is the ideal gift choice. Also great as a surprise gift for adult men and women, teens, boys, girls, family or friends to create their own model pirate ship.
description: From the brand Brihappen Brihappen is a 3D puzzle building toy brand from China. Our mission is to make every user immersed and have fun.
